title: aita for accidentally stealing someone’s pizza and telling the delivery guy to fuck off?
text: hi all long time lurker first time posting. i finally have a moment to share. so this happened just recently and i wanted to get an opinion while it’s still fresh. i was sitting on my couch watching netflix after smoking a joint. i hear a knock, open then the door to find a  dominos pizza  and some brownies were  delivered on my doorstep. i thought nothing of it at first since my brother orders the same combo on a weekly basis ever since the pandemic started. i see the delivery guy about to leave, and thanked him. i give my brother the food and he immediately starts attacking the brownies. not even 10 minutes later i hear another knock at the door and it’s the same delivery guy. here’s how the conversation went down.  op=me ob= op’s brother  dg: delivery guy dg: hey the pizza i gave you, was the order yours? op: what?...should be? hey ob did you order again? ob: no. you didn’t?   op: i’m sorry i thought my brother got something.  dg: you didn’t check it? op: i saw that the pizza was different but.. sorry. dg: you still ate the pizza  after knowing? op: it was a mistake what can i do?! fuck off! dg: fuck this shit! after that he just walks off. i wasn’t going pay for it because i didn’t know. maybe me being high made me more anxious and confrontational. i asked my brother if he wanted to pay but hen just shrugged and continued eating. i don’t think it’s a big deal the people who ordered the pizza will likely get another with extra sides for free. so aita?

storyboard.content: I was sitting on my couch watching Netflix after smoking a joint. My brother regularly orders the same Domino's pizza and brownies combo on a weekly basis.

I heard a knock at the door, found a Domino's pizza and brownies on my doorstep, and took the food inside assuming my brother had ordered it. I gave my brother the food and he immediately started eating.
I noticed the pizza was different from what my brother usually orders, but I didn't check or question it at the time.
The delivery guy came back less than 10 minutes later and asked if the order was actually mine. He pointed out that I had still eaten the pizza even after seeing it was different.
When the delivery guy confronted me, I said "it was a mistake, what can I do?!" and told him to fuck off.
I refused to pay for the pizza because I didn't know it wasn't ours. I asked my brother if he wanted to pay but he just shrugged and kept eating.
Maybe being high made me more anxious and confrontational than I would normally be.
I don't think it's a big deal because the people who ordered the pizza will likely get another one with extra sides for free.
